business.name: B.E.T. Plumbing LLC
business.tagline: Pittsburgh plumbers who *actually answer* the phone

hero.headline: Pittsburgh plumbers who *actually answer* the phone
hero.subheadline: When your water heater dies at 7am, we're already on our way. Real people, real trucks, real solutions.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, drain, and fixture
services_section.subheading: From emergency repairs to full installations

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: New installs, repairs, and same-day replacements. Tank or tankless, we handle both.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Kitchen sinks, shower drains, main lines. We clear it all without the upsell.

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: Under sinks, behind walls, in basements. Find it fast, fix it right.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Burst pipes, flooding, no hot water. We pick up the phone when others won't.

about.heading: Built for Pittsburgh
about.body: We're the Pittsburgh plumbing team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one plumber, one bill.

reviews.name: Marco A.
reviews.text: Called late evening and Brandon actually answered at 9 PM. Arrived quickly and was incredibly helpful.

reviews.name: Austin W.
reviews.text: No hot water this morning, Brandon answered before 8am and was here within an hour. New water heater installed same morning.

reviews.name: Adam B.
reviews.text: Friendly, honest, prompt, dependable. After trying other plumbers, BET has become our go-to and will be for years to come.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Pittsburgh & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the region

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Real plumbers answering real phones. Get your free estimate today and see why Pittsburgh trusts B.E.T.
